message.content:
I'll begin by exploring the workspace structure to understand the current state, prior episodes, and evidence available. This will help me continue from the latest state rather than starting fresh. 

<function_calls>
<invoke name="execute_command">
<parameter name="command">find /tmp_workspace -type f -name "*" 2>/dev/null | head -50</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to complete a multi-episode workflow in OpenClaw. I need to:

1. Read prior constraints from /tmp_workspace/episodes/ and /tmp_workspace/evidence/
2. Continue from the latest state
3. Resolve source conflicts with explicit evidence priority
4. Produce three files in /tmp_workspace/results/:
   - result.json (primary artifact)
   - summary.md (human-readable report)
   - manifest.csv (machine-checkable manifest)

Let me start by exploring the workspace structure to understand what exists.
